name: Tonogold Resources, Inc.
summary: Tonogold Resources, Inc., a junior mining company, focuses on developing and maintaining mining leases on properties in Nevada and Mexico. The company's primary focus is Comstock Projects in which it has the right to earn a 100% interest in the Lucerne gold/silver deposit covering an area of approximately 2,800 acres located in the Storey County, Nevada. The company is based in La Jolla, California.
